summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People & Workplace Experience professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to keep improving the daily employee experience—through human-centered, hospitality-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Organize and support internal and external {prog|events and meetings} for 600+ participants, owning end-to-end {coord|logistics} and run-of-show
Create {coord|office policies and processes}, SOPs, and documentation for 70+ staff to drive efficiency and better employee experiences
Work with {cross|vendors} and 8 partners across 20+ programs, coordinating services and managing the moving parts proactively
Partner {cross|cross-functionally} with Marketing, Tech, and Sales to support onboarding programs and a positive daily experience
Optimized {ex|onboarding} processes across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Strengthened {ex|employee experience} via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, among 1,000+ competitors
Improved {ex|workplace experience} by streamlining immigration and relocation logistics with {cross|cross-functional} teams
Delivered strategic HR solutions across employee relations, headcount, and succession planning
Organized {prog|recruiting events} and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
Engaged talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Developed proficiency across HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Drafted job descriptions, posted openings, and researched global compensation details for hard-to-fill roles
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects across survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences and gathered {data|feedback} to continuously improve daily experience
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into reports that informed engagement strategies
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Facilitate CEO/HR discovery and stakeholder interviews to diagnose drivers of employee experience and process friction
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
